title: Franky Draws the Family's Attention
description: Pages 11–15 focus on franky draws the family's attention, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Some were, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: others bow- Ed down to doFlamingo, right there and then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They've survived as his body- guards....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What a bunch of traitors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They were only acting on the orders of that crazed King Riku!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So allow me to take them on as my men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I... I believe that they too had to make an impossible decision.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Well if that's how it is then I can't help but cry again!! You guys...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But even the soldiers who were killed and those who sur- rendered...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If added up, they fall short of the total number of military in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What are you saying!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I expect it has something to do with one of my own missing memories...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: fraland, remember what I showed you in town, earlier?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Those of us turned into toys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Remember everything from our time as humans...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: My name is Milo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Not wan- poko.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: But everyone else has completely for- gotten that, for instance, we toys used to be their family members.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: They don't even realize that they've forgotten something so important...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: This is dress- Rosa's greatest tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: And we toys are the same way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...In other words, there are toys walking the streets who have forgotten who you used to be?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Yes, exactly

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Furthermore, everyone remember- bers starting to hate dofla- Mingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: At the instant they were turned into toys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: In the darkness, Doflamingo consigned to oblivion any and all seeds of revolt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: But should this land's darkness be brought to light, one would find the seething will of Rebel- Lion!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: More than any- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: These "tragic ranks"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hold the key to our strategy, here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: So that's it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: They're the Trump card you mentioned before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: If you're going up against a shichibi- Kai and his crew, then these guys alone wouldn't be enough, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: If all the toys in this country joined the ranks of your Rebel- Lion, that might just do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, hey hold on now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Why does it sound like you're raring to take down Doflamingo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: All we're here to do is destroy the factory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: And when that's done, we're outta here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, Robin!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I will never forgive Dofla- Mingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Ehh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Today is the long-expected day of our decisive battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: The incident this morning was no less than an invi- tattoo to war from the enemy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And usoland's appearance on this day is surely no coincidence!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: The heavens are telling us to fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: What happen- Ed this morning?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Doflamingo appeared to have Abdi- cited the throne.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Ah... the truth about that is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: We were thrilled to hear that... Can you imagine? It was a like a miracle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: But then we were told it was a misprint....!! From up on Cloud Nine, smashed down to the depths of hell...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Back down to the height of despair... so isn't it natural-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: that we would choose today to wage our final revolt?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Sorry about that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Beneath dress- Rosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Scrap- yard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: So, even though you're retired...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: You led a ship here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: Hiya Haya, indeed I did!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: because I have noone to inherit command of the Happou Navy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: ...If only I had had some grandchil- Dren.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: It's even hard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: For villains,I suppose.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: ...Am I imagining this? It feels like a large hole has opened up in my consciousness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: ...It's the same feeling as ten years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #64
dialogue.text: Where am I going!? Help me, Grandpa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: ...!!? What have you done to the lone wolf Abdullah!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #66
dialogue.text: What'd you do to the aloof Warrior Jest!?

summary: Franky Draws the Family's Attention focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the underground operation advances as Usopp, Robin, the Tontatta, and Franky move toward the factory and Sugar.
